candidates.productName: Stainless Steel Integral Bonnet Needle Valve, 0.37 Cv, 1/4 in. Swagelok Tube Fitting, Regulating Stem, SC-11 Cleaned
candidates.notes: Body: 316 Stainless Steel. Cleaning Process: Special Cleaning and Packaging (SC-11) per ASTM G93 Level C. Max pressure rating listed as 3130 PSIG @ 600°F / 215 BAR @ 315°C. Pressure converted from 3130 PSIG = ~21,582,670 Pa. Min temp: -65°F (-53°C). Max temp: 450°F (232°C). SC-11 cleaning explicitly noted. Price requires login. Fluid compatibility for oxygen not explicitly stated on this page, but SC-11 cleaning per ASTM G93 Level C is an oxygen-cleaning standard. Cryogenic compatibility not explicitly stated (min temp -53°C is not cryogenic range).

candidates.productName: Stainless Steel Integral Bonnet Needle Valve, 0.37 Cv, 6 mm Swagelok Tube Fitting, Regulating Stem, SC-11 Cleaned
candidates.notes: Body: 316 Stainless Steel. Cleaning Process: Special Cleaning and Packaging (SC-11) per ASTM G93 Level C — suitable for oxygen service. Max pressure rating: 3130 PSIG @ 600°F / 215 BAR @ 315°C (converted: ~21,581,350 Pa at max temp). Min temperature: -65°F (-53°C). Stem type: Regulating. Flow pattern: 2-Way, Shutoff, Straight. Low Emissions Certified: Yes. Price requires login. This is a needle/metering valve, not a feed valve; Cv of 0.37 is very low and may not meet minimum_cda_m2 requirement of 0.0001 m2 for LOX feed application.
